'''Cantras Gola''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Perinn sector/Legends|Perinn sector]]. It was a corporate planet controlled by [[PowerOn Conglomerate]]. During the [[Thrawn campaign]], it decided to leave the [[Pentastar Alignment]] and join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. The Alignment threatened to kill the children of the [[Ambassador/Legends|ambassador]] of Cantras Gola if he had any sort of meeting with the New Republic. The children had been taken by [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] to [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]]. They were rescued by a [[Red Moons]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] grup, allowing Cantras Gola to resume joining the New Republic.

{{Planet-stub}}
